subject: Deal page taking 8+ seconds to load
body: Since the update last week, my deal pages are taking 8-10 seconds to load. This is a significant problem when I'm on a call with a customer and trying to pull up their quote details. Other pages in the app load fine — it's specifically the deal detail page. Tested in Chrome and Safari, both Macs in our office. Some deals load fine, others are slow — they don't seem to correlate with deal size or activity volume.
